sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt64, haystack String, needle String, start_pos UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ложка, кошка, картошка', 'КА', 1), (2, ' тест', 'e', 1), (3, '', 'A', 1), (4, 'Hello World', 'world', 1);
SELECT id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS count FROM test_strings WHERE count > 0;
SELECT id, haystack, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE COUNT(countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle)) > 0 GROUP BY id, haystack HAVING COUNT(haystack) > 1;

SELECT id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'ане', 1) AS count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) > 0) AS total FROM test_strings WHERE start_pos > 0 ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT id, haystack, needle, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle, start_pos) FROM test_strings WHERE countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'Lo', start_pos + 1) > 0;
CREATE TABLE another_test_strings AS SELECT id, haystack, NULL AS needle, start_pos FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO another_test_strings SELECT id, NULLIF(haystack, ''), NULL AS needle, start_pos FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(IFNULL(haystack, ''), 'ка', start_pos) FROM another_test_strings WHERE start_pos < 10;
SELECT id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(COALESCE(haystack, ''), 'test') > 0 AS has_test FROM test_strings WHERE haystack IS NOT NULL;
